name_en: Top-tier replica M12098 This Slouchy medium bag features a distinctive silhouette crafted from Monogram canvas, accented with exquisite metal hardware including a new lock and brand name. Spacious interior fits a wallet, smartphone, and 13-inch laptop, making it an ideal choice for commuting or weekend outings. Dimensions: 40 × 31 × 11 cm
